title: I'm trying to map all vacation rentals you can book direct
abstract:
Hi HN,

StayThere.ai started because I was trying to get more repeat guests to book directly instead of through Airbnb. About two years ago I took over managing seven short term rentals, which has since grown to 33. I started texting guests a link to our direct booking website after checkout and ad
